seconds_v2.desc: A finished white 6 oz tin candle with two lit cotton wicks sits on a white ledge against a beige wall; both flames burning, small melt pools forming. '5 minutes in' overlay top-right.
Same double-wick tin candle burning; flames steady, melt pool just beginning to widen across the soy wax surface.
Both wicks burn with taller flames, wax surface near the wicks starting to liquefy.
Continued burn test, two flames upright, melt pool slowly spreading outward in the white tin.
Flames flicker on the double-wick tin candle, wax pool a bit wider toward the tin edges.
Steady two-flame burn, soy melt pool continuing to expand across the surface.
Both wicks lit, melt pool broader, illustrating an even burn of the tin candle.
Final frame of the burn test: double-wick white tin candle burning with a wide melt pool.

windows.embed_text_v2: Burn test of finished two-wick 6 oz white tin soy candle, two small flames burning, melt pool widening from edge ring to full pool, on-screen overlay text shows 5 minutes in then 1.5 hours in.
windows.summary_v2: A two-wick 6 oz white tin soy candle is shown burning over time during a burn test, with on-screen time labels.

tags_v2.action: burn test of finished two-wick tin candle

seconds_v2.desc: Burn-test of a finished 6 oz round white tin candle with two wicks burning, narrow ring of melted pool around each wick on the cream wax surface; '5 minutes in' overlay text in the top right corner.
Same tin candle with two flames steady; melt pool barely larger; '5 minutes in' label still visible top-right.
Cut to later time: full melt pool now covers the wax across the tin; overlay updated to '1.5 hours in', both wicks burn brightly.
Same 1.5 hours-in burn shot; two flames flicker above the full liquid wax pool; reflection on white shelf below.
Burn continues; both flames remain steady on the molten wax, '1.5 hours in' overlay text persists.
Static tin-candle burn shot continues; tin sits on a white shelf against a white wall.
Same view of the burning two-wick tin candle, even flame pattern, overlay unchanged.
Slight camera move to a higher angle; two flames visible from a tilted view inside the tin showing the full pool of melted soy wax.
